heading: Definitions
label: 1101 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided:Pub. L. 88–363, § 178 Stat. 299July 7, 1964“That this Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Roosevelt Campobello International Park Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided:Pub. L. 88–363, § 178 Stat. 299July 7, 1964“That this Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Roosevelt Campobello International Park Act’.”

children.label: a
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Roosevelt Campobello International Park Commission.

children.label: b
children.text: The term “United States members” means members of the Commission appointed by the President. The term “Canadian members” means members of the Commission appointed by the appropriate authorities in Canada.
